display_name: C2040 Double Pitch Conveyor Chain (S roller)
description: C2040 double pitch conveyor chain, 25.4 mm (1 in) pitch, standard (S) roller. Flat link plate contour, twice the pitch of the corresponding base roller chain. Ideal for long-span, low-speed conveyance. RS sprockets usable with S rollers at 30+ teeth.
options_upgrades: A1|A2|K1|K2|SA1|SA2|SK1|SK2|GNK1|EP extended pin|hollow pin|plastic roller|stainless SS|nickel NP|NEP coated|low-noise SNP
uniking_notes: PKG-01b. Dims catalog-verified from official Tsubaki PDF. Tensile equals corresponding base roller chain — pull from Tsubaki strength tables pp.91-92 in 01c patch; left blank rather than derived. [provenance: catalog-verified]
